source_url: How to use spaced repetition for vocabulary
english_script:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 30 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about how to use spaced repetition for vocabulary. The video explained a simple way to remember new words better.

Spaced repetition means you review words at certain times. You don't study them every day. Instead, you space out your practice. The video said that our brains forget things over time. But if we review right before we forget, we remember better.

The video shared a few key points. First, you should review new words after one day. Then after three days. Then after a week. Then after two weeks. This helps move words into long-term memory.

Second, use flashcards. Write the word on one side. Write the meaning on the other. Quiz yourself often. The video said to sort cards into piles. Easy words you review less. Hard words you review more.

Third, make it a habit. Spend just 10 minutes each day. This is better than studying for one hour once a week. Short daily practice works best.

Fourth, test yourself. Don't just read the word. Try to say the meaning before you look. This active recall helps a lot.

From this video I learned that spaced repetition is a smart way to learn words. It saves time and helps you remember for a long time.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
嗨，大家好，我是Lulu。每日英语练习的第30天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我看了一个关于如何使用间隔重复法来学习词汇的视频。视频解释了一种记住新单词的简单方法。

间隔重复意味着你在特定的时间复习单词。你不是每天学习它们。相反，你间隔开你的练习。视频说我们的大脑会随时间遗忘事情。但如果我们刚好在忘记之前复习，我们会记得更好。

视频分享了一些关键点。首先，你应该在一天后复习新单词。然后三天后。然后一周后。然后两周后。这有助于将单词移入长期记忆。

第二，使用闪卡。在一面写上单词。在另一面写上意思。经常测试自己。视频说把卡片分成几堆。容易的单词你复习少一些。难的单词你复习多一些。

第三，养成习惯。每天只花10分钟。这比每周一次学习一小时更好。每天的短时间练习效果最好。

第四，测试自己。不要只是读单词。在查看之前试着说出意思。这种主动回忆很有帮助。

从这个视频我学到间隔重复是一种学习单词的聪明方法。它节省时间并帮助你长时间记住。

谢谢收听，明天见。
concise_english:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 30 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about spaced repetition for vocabulary. It is a method to remember words better. You review words at set times. First after one day, then three days, then a week. This helps move words to long-term memory.

Use flashcards. Write the word on one side and meaning on the other. Quiz yourself often. Review hard words more, easy words less.

Spend 10 minutes each day. Short daily practice is better than long weekly sessions.

Test yourself actively. Try to say the meaning before you look at the answer.

From this I learned that spaced repetition is a simple and effective way to learn vocabulary.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
concise_chinese:
嗨，大家好，我是Lulu。每日英语练习的第30天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我看了一个关于间隔重复法学习词汇的视频。这是一种更好地记住单词的方法。你在设定的时间复习单词。先是1天后，然后3天后，然后一周后。这有助于将单词移入长期记忆。

使用闪卡。一面写单词，另一面写意思。经常测试自己。难的单词多复习，容易的单词少复习。

每天花10分钟。每天的短时间练习比每周长时间学习更好。

主动测试自己。在查看答案之前试着说出意思。

从这我学到间隔重复是一种简单有效的学习词汇的方法。

谢谢收听，明天见。
